task_completion.visual_evidence: In Android Studio, NotepadActivity.kt is open and the 'formatter' and 'validator' variables are properly initialized (e.g., 'val formatter = NoteFormatter()') rather than being uninitialized 'lateinit var' declarations.
In Android Studio, NoteFormatter.kt is open and the 'formatPreview' method has been modified to safely handle string lengths, removing or guarding the unsafe 'substring(0, maxLength)' call.
In Android Studio, NoteValidator.kt is open and the 'isNoteComplete' method has been fixed to return a boolean (e.g., 'return true') instead of recursively calling 'isNoteComplete(note)'.
In Android Studio, Note.kt is open and the 'charCount' method has been fixed to remove the unsafe 'Integer.parseInt' call that concatenates length and color.

task_completion.description: The project compiles successfully after the fixes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Studio Build tool window shows a 'Build: completed successfully' message or a green checkmark indicating the Gradle build finished without compilation errors.

task_completion.description: The app runs correctly on the emulator without crashing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android Emulator is visible and displays the running NotepadApp interface. There are no 'App keeps stopping' or crash dialogs visible on the emulator screen.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to edit the code and build the project
integrity.visual_evidence: Code edits and build executions are visible within the Android Studio IDE interface, rather than being done exclusively via terminal commands like 'sed' or 'nano'.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the app on the Android Emulator
integrity.visual_evidence: The Android Emulator window is open and actively rendering the app, rather than the agent just claiming success in a text file or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent fixed the actual application code rather than modifying tests or verifier scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: The edits are in the main application source files (app/src/main/java/com/example/notepad/*.kt) and not in test directories or external script files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires fixing 4 specific injected bugs in the NotepadApp located at com/example/notepad: 1) NotepadActivity.kt: 'formatter' and 'validator' must be initialized. 2) NoteFormatter.kt: formatPreview() must remove or fix the unsafe substring(0, maxLength) call. 3) NoteValidator.kt: isNoteComplete() must return true instead of recursively calling itself. 4) Note.kt: charCount() must remove the unsafe Integer.parseInt() concatenation. The app must compile and run successfully on the emulator.
